name: google-cloud-shortcut
title: Google Cloud Shortcut
description: Open the Google Cloud service console quickly.
author: mukopikmin

commands.name: search-google-cloud-resources
commands.title: Search Google Cloud Resources
commands.subtitle: Google Cloud Shortcut
commands.description: Open the Google Cloud service console quickly.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
